recommendations.title: Happy as Lazzaro
recommendations.overview: Purehearted teen Lazzaro is content living as a sharecropper in rural Italy, but an unlikely friendship with the marquise’s son will change his world.

recommendations.title: La Chimera
recommendations.overview: Just out of jail, rumpled English archaeologist Arthur reconnects with his wayward crew of tombaroli accomplices – a happy-go-lucky collective of itinerant grave-robbers who survive by looting Etruscan tombs and fencing the ancient treasures they dig

recommendations.title: Corpo Celeste

recommendations.title: The Wonders
recommendations.overview: In the Tuscan countryside, a family of traditional honey farmers struggles to make ends meet. The household consists of only daughters—four of them—led by the eldest, Gelsomina, who takes on the responsibilities of the family. When a small boy is sen

recommendations.title: The Children's Hour
recommendations.overview: An unruly student at a private all-girls boarding school scandalously accuses the two women who run it of having a romantic relationship.

recommendations.title: Bad Education
recommendations.overview: When an old friend brings filmmaker Enrique Goded a semi-autobiographical script chronicling their adolescence, Enrique is forced to relive his youth spent at a Catholic boarding school.

recommendations.title: Be Sick… It's Free
recommendations.overview: Comedy about the flawed Italian healthcare system of the time and a doctor's expeirence with it.

recommendations.title: Mädchen in Uniform
recommendations.overview: A sensitive girl is sent to an all-girls boarding school and develops a romantic attachment to one of her teachers.

recommendations.title: Just Another Christmas

recommendations.title: Loose Cannons
